summary: Smoke tested iter-7: LLM cache, difficulty-aware refinement, chords, PUT /songs/{id}, toolbar (difficulty/practice/reprocess/edit), MIDI editor overlay + shift, chord strip. All primary flows working.
passed: POST /api/refine-midi 1st call returned cached=false, output notes, chords array (5 entries, first: {time:0,name:'Cmaj'})
POST /api/refine-midi 2nd identical call returned cached=true in 0.11s (vs 2.6s first)
Different difficulty (beginner) re-ran LLM: cached=false, output=7 (< advanced output=8)
POST /api/songs accepts and persists chords array (chords_saved=1)
PUT /api/songs/{id} updates notes, GET /api/songs/{id} confirms new notes (midi:72, count:1)
Frontend loads on public URL, toolbar visible after selecting song
All toolbar testids present: difficulty-{beginner,intermediate,advanced}, practice-{both,right,left}, reprocess-button, edit-toggle
difficulty-beginner click applies active highlight class (bg-[#00F0FF])
practice-right click applies highlight class; practice-both restores

Edit mode: edit-toolbar visible, midi-editor-overlay present, all edit testids (selected-note-label, shift-semitone-up/down, shift-octave-up/down, delete-note, global-shift-up/down, edit-cancel, edit-save) present
Clicking edit-note-0 selects note showing 'C5'; shift-semitone-up changes label to 'C#5'
chord-label-* rendered in chord strip for song with chords (count=1)
